headline: Axon to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings on May 6, 2026
summary: Axon (Nasdaq: AXON), the global public safety technology leader, today announced that it will report first quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. Axon will host a live Zoom video webinar to discuss the company's financial results at 5:00 p.m. ET that same day.
